intro: Hedyosmum glaucum, also known as the sweet pepperbark or sweet pepperbark tree, is a small evergreen shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
